selections.name: Sonhador
selections.reason: Boasts the highest speed figure (105) and class rating (113) in the field. Tyler Gaffalione takes the mount, and she has been facing much tougher company.

selections.name: Raghba
selections.reason: Comes off a strong 2nd place finish in a MSW at Aqueduct. Pletcher and Velazquez are a dangerous combination, and she has a solid 100 speed figure.

selections.name: Song Of Sarah
selections.reason: Ran a good 2nd in her last start at Gulfstream. Rosario rides for Gargan, and she should get a ground-saving trip from the inside post.

selections.name: Babysitter
selections.reason: Showed improvement in her last out at Turfway. Luis Saez takes over, and she has the tactical speed to be in the mix early.

danger_horse.name: Raghba
danger_horse.reason: Pletcher trainee with strong figures who could easily wire this field if left uncontested.

selections.name: Tiz Freedom
selections.reason: Taking a massive class drop from MSW/ALW company into a $20k claimer. Owns a field-best 108 speed figure and gets Luis Saez in the irons.

selections.name: Whiskey Shot
selections.reason: First start since being reported as a gelding. Also taking a significant class drop for Brisset with Prat aboard. Major threat.

selections.name: Stonemont Reunion
selections.reason: Consistent runner at this level who should benefit from the pace scenario. Gabriel Saez can work out a stalking trip.

selections.name: Ryu Mo
selections.reason: Has back class and a 102 speed figure. Could pick up the pieces for the bottom of the exotics at a price.

danger_horse.name: Whiskey Shot
danger_horse.reason: The gelding angle combined with the class drop makes him a prime candidate to wake up with a huge effort.

selections.name: Hot Mash
selections.reason: Stands out with a massive 119 speed figure and 123 class rating. Rosario rides for Servis, and she looks much the best in this turf sprint.

selections.name: Capturing
selections.reason: Pletcher trainee with a 120 speed figure. Velazquez will have her forwardly placed, and she is the logical alternative to the top pick.

selections.name: Perfect Figure
selections.reason: Wesley Ward runner with Flavien Prat. Has a 118 speed figure and fits the turf sprint profile perfectly.

selections.name: Stepping Stones
selections.reason: Gaffalione rides for Joe Sharp. Consistent figures and should be flying late if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Morunning
selections.reason: Drops into a starter allowance and gets Luis Saez. Has strong recent figures (105 speed) and should get a perfect stalking trip.

selections.name: Mary's Boy Bolt
selections.reason: Consistent runner for Chris Hartman with a 108 speed figure. Machado is riding well and this horse always fires.

selections.name: Askari
selections.reason: Kenneally trainee who has back class and a 108 speed figure. Should save ground from the inside post.

selections.name: Ice Shot
selections.reason: Rosario takes the mount. Has a 99 speed figure and could close into the exotics if the pace is honest.

danger_horse.name: Mary's Boy Bolt
danger_horse.reason: Very consistent type who rarely runs a bad race and fits this level perfectly.

selections.name: Discotheque
selections.reason: Has a solid 103 speed figure and 108 class rating. Drops into a maiden claimer and should find this company much easier.

selections.name: Street Party
selections.reason: Kenneally trainee with a 102 speed figure. Should be forwardly placed and has a good chance to break his maiden here.

selections.name: Good Willie
selections.reason: Norm Casse runner with Rosario aboard. Has a 108 speed figure and the rail draw could provide a ground-saving advantage.

selections.name: Blue Mountains
selections.reason: Prat rides for McCarthy. Figures are slightly lower but has room to improve in this weak field.

danger_horse.name: Street Party
danger_horse.reason: Has the tactical speed to clear this field and could take them all the way on the engine.

selections.name: Surprise Ending
selections.reason: Brendan Walsh trainee with a massive 121 speed figure. Gaffalione rides, and she looks primed for a huge effort at this distance.

selections.name: Kentucky Belle
selections.reason: Brad Cox runner with Flavien Prat. Has a 113 speed figure and 116 class rating. The main threat to the top pick.

selections.name: Candy Rockette
selections.reason: Bill Mott trainee with Luis Saez. Owns a 119 speed figure and will be closing late.

selections.name: Bless Her
selections.reason: Graham Motion runner with John Velazquez. Has tactical speed and should get a good trip from the inside.

danger_horse.name: Kentucky Belle
danger_horse.reason: Cox and Prat are a lethal combo, and her class rating suggests she can handle this group.

selections.name: Whatchatalkinabout
selections.reason: Wesley Ward trainee with Joel Rosario. Boasts a 112 speed figure and 115 class rating. Looks like a standout in this sprint.

selections.name: Floodlites
selections.reason: Another Ward runner, this one with Velazquez. Has a 109 speed figure and will benefit from the rail draw.

selections.name: Kalahari Dreams
selections.reason: Philip Bauer trainee with Luis Saez. Has a 109 speed figure and should be tracking the early pace.

selections.name: Keep It Easy
selections.reason: Dale Romans runner with a 105 speed figure. Can pick up the pieces if the pace gets too hot.

selections.name: Works For Me
selections.reason: Owns a field-best 124 speed figure. Flavien Prat takes the mount, and he has the class to beat this allowance field.

selections.name: Arrest Me Red
selections.reason: Classy Wesley Ward runner with a 116 speed figure. Rosario rides, and despite the outside draw, he is a major player.

selections.name: Troubleshooting
selections.reason: Gaffalione rides from the rail. Has a 116 speed figure and should get a perfect ground-saving trip.

selections.name: My Own
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 109 speed figure. Could hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Arrest Me Red
danger_horse.reason: Multiple stakes winner who has the back class to blow this field away if he brings his A-game.

selections.name: Batten Down
selections.reason: Bill Mott trainee with Flavien Prat. Has a 112 speed figure and 112 class rating. Looks primed for a top effort in this stakes race.

selections.name: Stars And Stripes
selections.reason: Another Mott runner, this one with Luis Saez. Has a 114 speed figure and the rail draw gives him a tactical edge.

selections.name: Rattle N Roll
selections.reason: Classy McPeek runner with Brian Hernandez. Always dangerous late and has a 109 speed figure.

selections.name: British Isles
selections.reason: Velazquez rides for Baltas. Has a 114 speed figure and should be forwardly placed.

danger_horse.name: Stars And Stripes
danger_horse.reason: Stablemate to the top pick who has the figures to win this and gets a great draw.

selections.name: Tawny Port
selections.reason: Clement trainee with a massive 121 speed figure. Rosario rides, and he has proven he can handle marathon turf distances.

selections.name: Grand Sonata
selections.reason: Pletcher runner with a 122 speed figure. Gaffalione will have him rolling late, and he is a major stakes threat.

selections.name: Burnham Square
selections.reason: Wilkes trainee with a 114 speed figure. Hernandez rides, and he has the stamina for this trip.

selections.name: Truly Quality
selections.reason: Jonathan Thomas runner with a 118 speed figure. Machado takes the mount and he fits well here.

danger_horse.name: Grand Sonata
danger_horse.reason: Owns the highest speed figure in the field and has the class to win this Grade 2.

selections.name: Be The Light
selections.reason: Brad Cox trainee with Luis Saez. Boasts a 112 speed figure and 110 class rating, making her a standout in this maiden field.

selections.name: Island Flower
selections.reason: Flavien Prat rides for Cherie DeVaux. Has a 105 speed figure and should improve in this spot.

selections.name: Miss Complicated
selections.reason: Wilkes runner with Machado. Has a 102 speed figure and 112 class rating. Outside draw is the only concern.

selections.name: Fast Gun
selections.reason: Asmussen trainee with Gaffalione. Has a 111 speed figure and should be part of the early pace.
